data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aims to validate the requirement that 'Providers submit bids (price + availability)', but there is no evidence provided that directly confirms this functionality. While the linked use case describes a scenario where providers bid, the evidence does not include any API reads or persisted state checks that demonstrate this requirement is satisfied. Therefore, there is a clear gap in the evidence needed to validate this requirement.
gaps: No evidence of API reads or persisted state checks confirming that providers can submit bids.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
